fasta.title: Reference FASTA
fasta.description: Reference genome FASTA used to build the Bowtie2 index.

bowtie2_version.title: Bowtie2 Version
bowtie2_version.description: Select the specific version of Bowtie2 to use (see quay.io/biocontainers/bowtie2 for available versions)

transcriptome_source.title: Transcriptome Source (optional)
transcriptome_source.description: Tool used to generate the transcriptome FASTA from genome + GTF (only applies when GTF is provided). Use gffread for prokaryotic genomes; use rsem for eukaryotic genomes.

bowtie2_extra_args.title: Extra Arguments
bowtie2_extra_args.description: Additional arguments to pass to bowtie2-build.
